$schema: Configures multilingual support across the site
_notes: Adding a new language: append an object with translate_target=true and translate_source set to source language code. The translate Action picks it up on next run.
filename_suffix appears between slug and .html (e.g. 'white-collar' + '.en' + '.html'). Empty for default language.
hreflang values follow IETF BCP 47 (zh, zh-CN, en, en-US, ja, ko, ...).
manual_only=true means the translate Action skips this language (e.g. tactful editions need human authoring).
update_agent_model is overrideable via UPDATE_AGENT_MODEL env var in workflows.
